measurement.note: Single source of truth for every gate. The loop CANNOT edit this file (grilled decision 4).

_legend.budget: current enforced gate. null = not yet calibrated; run `pnpm perf:calibrate`. Measure-then-ratchet (decision 10).
_legend.target: the 'excellent' floor for this layer, the goal to ratchet toward. Per-layer physics floor (decision 3).
